# fyp-3 Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-24

## Active Technologies

- Python 3.11+ + SQLite3, PyQt5 or Tkinter at the application layer, bcrypt for credential hashing, pytest for validation (001-database-storage-core)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

cd src; pytest; ruff check .

## Code Style

Python 3.11+: Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes

- 001-database-storage-core: Added Python 3.11+ + SQLite3, PyQt5 or Tkinter at the application layer, bcrypt for credential hashing, pytest for validation
